text_block_list.text: One day, while working in my office...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. Don't make any plans this weekend,
please.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I think it's perfect timing for a short break, so I'd
like to rest.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
That goes for you too. Don't forget to take some
time off.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Anyway, we have to get going...

She pulls out a crumpled up piece of paper from
her pocket.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...To the hot spring.
The next day...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Oh, this is pretty nice. I kind of like the smell of
the tatami mats.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I bet my mom would be so jealous if I sent her a
picture.
choice_data_list: Are you sure bringing me was the best choice?
Are you sure bringing me was the best choice?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Too late at this point. Besides, the ticket was
your prize originally.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I'm going to head back to my room. You
take it easy too.
Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Ah, there you are.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I guess dinner's served in that hall over there. You
going to eat?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: All right, let's go.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I thought the area around my nose felt strangely
smooth, but it's just the tape starting to peel off.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to go put on a new one. I'll catch up
soon, so you go ahead.
choice_data_list: We've come this far so let's stick together.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Fine. I'll make it quick.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Got it! Oh, that's the last of it...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Haha, you bought so much tape before, but it
seems like we've gone through it all.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
To be fair, it has been almost two years since the
Asahi Hai F.S.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Two years—no wait, I guess it's been three years
since my debut.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Who would've thought it'd last so long.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I guess we should. Could you do me a favor and
pick some out for me? I know you'll pick a good
one.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'll just use bandages until you get it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't feel right without anything. In any case,
it's just a temporary measure—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Young Brian
text_block_list.text: Hiccup... Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Young Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Are you still crying, Brian? Don't be such a baby!
You only fell down once!

text_block_list.name: Young Brian
text_block_list.text: But my nose hurts...

text_block_list.name: Young Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What are you we going to do with you? ...All
right, come here. I'll stick a magic bandage on it
to make you invincible!

text_block_list.name: Young Brian
text_block_list.text:
Invincible? Will that make me stronger than a
monster?

text_block_list.name: Young Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It sure will! Trust Big Sis, okay? And... there you
go!

text_block_list.name: Young Hayahide
text_block_list.text: How do you feel?

text_block_list.name: Young Brian
text_block_list.text:
Amazing! It doesn't hurt at all now! I really am
invincible!

text_block_list.name: Young Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Hey, Big Sis... Will you put one on for me
tomorrow too?

text_block_list.name: Young Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Haha, okay. But this is just a quick fix, okay? Be
sure to ask Mom to look at it!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...That's right. Ever since that time, I've always
had one.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Apparently, I've been "the invincible Brian"
for a long time now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Haha, yeah... Anyway, let's go get some grub.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
The new tape is on, so there shouldn't be
anything else I'm forgetting.

She's unusually talkative during dinner and keeps
the conversation flowing.

Whenever her older sister, Biwa Hayahide, comes
up in conversation, she speaks happily about her
childhood memories.

I sense that Narita Brian and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
